productDisplayName: Peter England Men Printed Red TShirt
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic with flock print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron There's no one who knows you better than yourself, for after all you are your own hard disc. Flaunt your belief in style with this T-shirt from the peter england Oddies collection. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this T-shirt offers exemplary comfort.
